name: ATLAS Consult
description: Consult ATLAS (the Data Operating System) before any data-import/migration/intake/BoB work — read the Source Registry, Tool Registry, and Wire Definitions first, so work reuses registered sources/tools instead of recreating them blind.
origin: GV2 WS-B pilot — converted from hookify `intent-atlas-consult` (a dumb context-injector, event:prompt/action:block used only to inject the runbook, not to detect a violation) by SHINOB1 sub-seat shinob1-build-wsb-atlas-skill
format_note: Structured to mirror Skill #001 (case-drive-checklist: SKILL.md + gates.md + surface.html + skill.json) — the only shipped skill format in this repo at draft time. RAIDEN's WS-C skills-library was reported in-flight in parallel but no WS-C schema/location was found in this repo as of 2026-07-08; this is an explicit format assumption to be reconciled before promotion.
